raw.subject: Your Cedar Rapids page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you're proud of your Black Angus heritage in the Midwest, which speaks to a deep commitment to quality and community. Your recent post about working with Chance Pint was especially interesting - it's clear you're always looking for new ways to serve your customers.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers who want to plan ahead or learn more about your services in the dark.

I took a close look at the photos and posts on your Facebook page, and I sketched out a simple homepage idea that showcases your menu hero, hours of operation, and a photo gallery to help people get a sense of your business. Here's a preview:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/rig-doctor-24-7-emergency-mobile-truck-and-trailer-repair-ce

This is just a starting point, and I'd love to discuss how we can bring this to life with a flat fee for local businesses. If you're interested in learning more, please reply to this email or let's schedule a quick call to explore your options.
